response.justification: While Sarah demonstrates strong technical leadership and mentoring capabilities, she falls dramatically short of the core technical requirements. The role requires 8 years of C++ programming; her resume shows only ~7 months at National Instruments plus academic work. Her infrastructure experience is primarily in web services and backend systems, not cloud compute platforms or hardware architecture. Recent years have focused on Node.js/TypeScript, moving further from the required skill set.
strengths: Extensive technical leadership experience across staff-level roles with proven mentoring and team guidance
Strong software craftsmanship foundation with deep testing and architectural design expertise
Demonstrated ability to build and ship large-scale distributed systems serving millions of requests
concerns: Only ~7 months of C++ experience versus 8 years required minimum—critical skill gap for role
Infrastructure background is web/backend services focused, not cloud compute platforms or hardware architecture
Last 3+ years primarily TypeScript/Node.js; insufficient recent C++ or cloud infrastructure platform work
